discoverability.competitive_assessment: Status quo: 37-day manual drought. Dome machine layer (ai_manifest.json, llms.txt, sitemap.xml, review-response.html) all dated 2026-04-17 — unchanged for 37 days. Our llms.txt draft matches deployed file byte-for-byte; both accurate against current wins.json (72 entries / 70 dome WINs, verdict split: 12 Refuted / 20 Self-Contradicted / 16 Misleading / 18 Std Model Explains / 3 Unfalsifiable / 3 Not Demonstrated). Meta tags, OG, ClaimReview all verified correct. GSC live (HTTP 200). No search visibility from either site for dome-specific vocabulary — consistent with all prior runs.
